name: Ace of Swords
meaning_upright: Clarity, breakthrough, truth, new idea, mental sharpness.
meaning_reversed: Confusion, clouded judgment, misused intellect, harsh words, false clarity.
love: honest communication, relationship clarity, revealing the truth, a decisive romantic conversation
love_reversed: clouded judgment, harsh words, miscommunication, false clarity
career: breakthrough idea, decisive communication, intellectual clarity, new professional strategy
career_reversed: confusion, clouded strategy, harsh communication, misused intellect
spiritual: spiritual breakthrough, clarity of truth, awakened perception, cutting through illusion
spiritual_reversed: clouded truth, confusion, false clarity, misused insight

name: Two of Swords
meaning_upright: Stalemate, difficult choice, avoidance, blocked feelings, truce.
meaning_reversed: Decision forced, information revealed, stalemate breaking, anxiety, release of denial.
love: romantic indecision, emotional stalemate, avoiding a decision, blocked communication
love_reversed: forced decision, anxiety, information revealed, ending denial
career: career indecision, stalled negotiation, avoiding a professional choice, limited information
career_reversed: decision forced, stalemate breaking, revealed information, anxiety
spiritual: blocked intuition, spiritual indecision, inner conflict, finding stillness before choosing
spiritual_reversed: ending denial, forced choice, released avoidance, anxious clarity

name: Three of Swords
meaning_upright: Heartbreak, painful truth, grief, sorrow, separation.
meaning_reversed: Healing heartbreak, forgiveness, releasing pain, recovery, old wounds resurfacing.
love: heartbreak, separation, painful truth, emotional betrayal
love_reversed: healing heartbreak, forgiveness, releasing pain, old wounds resurfacing
career: professional disappointment, workplace conflict, job rejection, difficult feedback
career_reversed: recovery from setbacks, releasing resentment, healing conflict, moving on
spiritual: truth revealed through pain, healing spiritual wounds, releasing sorrow, growth through acceptance
spiritual_reversed: healing old wounds, forgiveness, releasing sorrow, recovery through acceptance

name: Four of Swords
meaning_reversed: Burnout, restlessness, forced rest, returning to action, exhaustion ignored.
love: taking space in a relationship, emotional recovery, temporary separation, time to reflect
love_reversed: restlessness, forced rest, returning too soon, ignored exhaustion
career: career break, recovery from burnout, strategic pause, preparing your next move
career_reversed: burnout, restlessness, forced pause, returning to action
spiritual: meditation and retreat, spiritual rest, mental renewal, quiet integration
spiritual_reversed: restlessness, resisting rest, burnout, needing genuine renewal

name: Five of Swords
meaning_upright: Hollow victory, conflict, winning at all costs, discord, self-interest.
meaning_reversed: Reconciliation, making amends, releasing resentment, lingering grudges, lesson learned.
love: relationship conflict, hurtful communication, selfish behavior, winning at the cost of intimacy
love_reversed: reconciliation, making amends, lingering resentment, lesson learned
career: workplace conflict, unethical competition, damaged professional trust, hollow victory
career_reversed: making amends, releasing conflict, lingering tension, lesson learned
spiritual: examining ego conflict, consequences of harmful choices, spiritual humility, choosing peace over victory
spiritual_reversed: releasing resentment, making amends, humility, choosing peace

name: Six of Swords
meaning_upright: Transition, moving on, calmer waters, passage, gradual healing.
meaning_reversed: Resisting transition, unfinished business, rough crossing, returning to trouble, stuck baggage.
love: moving on from conflict, emotional transition, healing together, leaving relationship difficulties behind
love_reversed: resisting transition, unfinished business, returning to trouble, stuck
career: moving to a better role, gradual career recovery, relocation for work, leaving difficulties behind
career_reversed: resisting change, rough transition, unfinished business, stuck baggage
spiritual: spiritual transition, moving toward clarity, gradual healing, leaving troubled thoughts behind
spiritual_reversed: resisting transition, carrying old baggage, returning to trouble, stalled healing

name: Seven of Swords
meaning_upright: Deception, strategy, acting alone, getting away with it, cunning.
meaning_reversed: Confession, conscience, exposure, coming clean, self-deception revealed.
love: secrecy, dishonesty in love, avoiding commitment, hidden motives
love_reversed: confession, coming clean, exposed secrets, conscience
career: strategic planning, office politics, working independently, questionable professional tactics
career_reversed: exposure of tactics, coming clean, conscience, revealed deception
spiritual: self-deception, hidden motives, spiritual avoidance, need for honesty and integrity
spiritual_reversed: confession, self-deception revealed, conscience, coming clean

name: Eight of Swords
meaning_upright: Feeling trapped, self-restriction, victim mindset, mental prison, paralysis.
meaning_reversed: Liberation, new perspective, self-empowerment, blindfold removed, taking responsibility.
love: feeling trapped in a relationship, fear of leaving, limiting beliefs about love, emotional powerlessness
love_reversed: liberation, new perspective, self-empowerment, releasing limiting beliefs
career: feeling trapped at work, professional self-doubt, limited options, need for a new perspective
career_reversed: new perspective, breaking free, self-empowerment, taking responsibility
spiritual: self-imposed spiritual limits, restrictive beliefs, fear-based thinking, recognizing inner freedom
spiritual_reversed: liberation, removing the blindfold, self-empowerment, releasing fear-based beliefs

name: Nine of Swords
meaning_upright: Anxiety, sleepless nights, worry, dread, mental anguish.
meaning_reversed: Easing anxiety, facing fears, seeking help, perspective returning, recovery from despair.
love: relationship anxiety, fear of rejection, guilt or regret, overthinking love
love_reversed: easing anxiety, facing fears, seeking support, perspective returning
career: job anxiety, fear of failure, work-related stress, overthinking career problems
career_reversed: easing worry, facing fears, seeking help, recovery from stress
spiritual: spiritual anxiety, confronting fear, shadow thoughts, seeking peace through awareness
spiritual_reversed: easing anxiety, facing shadow thoughts, seeking help, returning peace

name: Ten of Swords
meaning_upright: Painful ending, rock bottom, betrayal, collapse, the worst is over.
meaning_reversed: Recovery, rising again, surviving the ending, old wounds closing, refusing the final lesson.
love: painful ending, betrayal, relationship collapse, accepting that a romantic chapter is over
love_reversed: recovery, rising again, surviving an ending, refusing the final lesson
career: job ending, failed project, professional betrayal, final career closure
career_reversed: recovery, rising again, surviving closure, slow rebuilding
spiritual: ending a painful cycle, surrender after crisis, spiritual closure, beginning again after collapse
spiritual_reversed: recovery, rising after collapse, surviving the ending, closing old wounds

name: Page of Swords
meaning_upright: Curiosity, vigilance, new ideas, mental energy, truth-seeking.
meaning_reversed: Gossip, hasty words, scattered thinking, spying, all talk.
love: curious communication, watching from a distance, cautious interest, questioning a partner’s intentions
love_reversed: hasty words, gossip, scattered thinking, all talk
career: professional research, sharp communication, new learning, monitoring opportunities
career_reversed: scattered thinking, gossip, hasty communication, spying
spiritual: questioning beliefs, spiritual study, alert observation, seeking truth with curiosity
spiritual_reversed: scattered thinking, hasty conclusions, gossip, seeking without depth

name: Knight of Swords
meaning_upright: Decisive action, ambition, directness, charging ahead, intellectual drive.
meaning_reversed: Recklessness, aggression, rushing past details, burnout sprint, verbal attacks.
love: direct romantic pursuit, intense conversations, rushing into a relationship, conflict through impulsive words
love_reversed: recklessness, verbal conflict, rushing in, burnout
career: fast career decisions, forceful ambition, intense debate, rushing into action
career_reversed: recklessness, aggression, rushing past details, burnout sprint
spiritual: intense pursuit of truth, forceful conviction, mental urgency, balancing action with reflection
spiritual_reversed: reckless pursuit, forceful conviction, rushing past reflection, mental urgency

name: Queen of Swords
meaning_upright: Clear judgment, independence, honest communication, boundaries, experienced wisdom.
meaning_reversed: Coldness, bitterness, harsh criticism, isolation, cynicism.
love: clear boundaries, emotional independence, honest expectations, discerning relationship choices
career: objective judgment, clear professional boundaries, independent expertise, direct communication
career_reversed: cynicism, harsh criticism, isolation, cold judgment
spiritual: spiritual discernment, honest self-reflection, clear energetic boundaries, wisdom through experience
spiritual_reversed: bitterness, harsh self-judgment, isolation, cynicism blocking wisdom

name: King of Swords
meaning_upright: Intellectual authority, truth, impartial judgment, strategy, ethical clarity.
meaning_reversed: Abuse of intellect, cold ruthlessness, manipulation, rigid logic, unjust judgment.
love: rational approach to love, serious communication, emotional restraint, fair and thoughtful partnership
love_reversed: cold logic, emotional restraint, harsh judgment, manipulation
career: strategic leadership, authority through knowledge, ethical decisions, analytical mastery
career_reversed: abuse of intellect, cold ruthlessness, rigid logic, unjust decisions
spiritual: higher reasoning, ethical spiritual authority, disciplined thought, commitment to truth
spiritual_reversed: rigid logic, misused intellect, cold detachment, judgment without compassion
